programme.desc: Jawy and Mane's tension continues. Xavi decides to invite Pepe to stay at the house. The Shores start to doubt Fernanda. Karime seeks out the notary to validate her virginity, and Mane and Fernanda end up in a heated confrontation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After confronting Mane, Dania makes an important decision. The Shores attend a band class where the "Verga Muerta" corrido is officially born. Jawy talks to Fernanda, and Mane is determined to leave Dania alone in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier and Pepe face off once again. A group of witches arrives at the house, and not everyone is pleased with their predictions. During the girls' night, Dania apologizes to Mane, and her reaction leaves several people speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores wonder about Dania's whereabouts. Chile and Diana go on a romantic date. Karime and Mane end up in the hospital. Pepe and Ramiro receive a call that changes their plans, while the Shores prepare for the carnival.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores arrive at the carnival. Karime and Potro share a very intimate moment. A hypnotist comes to the house. Nacha has suspicions and decides to take a pregnancy test, while a new member joins the vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Karime perform a binding ritual on their loves, and Nacha explodes at Jey. Potro catches Isa kissing Chile and gets upset. Mane finds out that Potro is talking bad about Jawy and decides to take action.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The tension between Jawy and Potro continues to rise. The newcomers go topless on the zip line. Nacha confronts Isa, while Jawy decides that the beach is the perfect place to sort things out with Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía arrives by surprise and takes them partying. Nacha is rushed to the hospital. Chile Finally kisses Isa . The shores have a very provocative session with Sexologist Silvia Olmedo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores get ready for the end of their adventure in Mazatlán. The guests arrive to celebrate the final party. Potro and Tadeo show up when things are already wild, and an incident between Chile's women is about to explode.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The final party ends in a fight among Chile's harem. Mane prepares a surprise ceremony for Jawy to reaffirm her love. The Shores leave the house, but Karime and Potro save the best for last.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Charlie Ross start the day in Church Stretton, Shropshire stopping at Welshpool, Oswestry and Wrexham before auction in Minsterley.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant travel from the West Midlands, through Lichfield and Walsall, ending at their final auction showdown in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new week for antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton. Braving the inclement weather, they head out on the road through Stamford, Lincolnshire, and Boston.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip through Norfolk, James Braxton tries his hand at bell ringing in Norwich and Anita Manning travels to Holt to visit a unique Arts & Craft stately home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton travel through Essex on the third leg of their road trip. James is feeling flush following success at the last auction -- can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in Cambridge, Anita Manning and James Braxton head towards their auction in Essex on the fourth leg of their road trip. James has promised to release his inner wild man -- could this be a chance for Anita to catch up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton begin the final day of their road trip in the town of Needham Market in Suffolk, ending with a crowning auction in Greenwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper kick off their Scottish road trip in Jedburgh, then travel through Powburn and Alnwick to an auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin the day in the Scottish capital of Edinburgh, travel through Dunfermline, and head to Stirlingshire for an auction at Kinbuck.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The third leg of the trip for Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begins at Perth and heads to the North Sea coast for an auction in Fife at St Andrews.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin the day at Abernyte in Perth and Kinross, before heading to an auction in the Highlands at Dingwall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the last day of their Scottish road trip, Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin at Nairnshire in Auldearn before traveling through Aberdeenshire and heading to auction at Hamilton, South Lanarkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant kick off the week in the seaside town of Morecambe, traveling through Cornforth and Chorely on their way to auction in Clitheroe town.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant start their second day in Preston, Lancashire before they make their way towards an auction in the Cheshire town of Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Lytham Hall in Lancashire, finds include a chair that is believed to be from Nelson's flagship, a gruesome insight into Victorian dentistry and a fantastic series of watercolours rescued from a skip and worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to the magnificent setting of Compton Verney in Warwickshire. Treasures brought in include illustrations from the 1930s, bronze statues from Benin in West Africa and a rare Chinese incense burner worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to Castle Ward in Northern Ireland, an unusual 18th-century mansion and backdrop to hit TV series Game of Thrones.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the lush surroundings of the National Botanic Garden of Wales in Carmarthenshire, where Fiona Bruce discovers how plant-based remedies were mixed and bottled by Victorian pharmacists.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special episode of Antiques Roadshow commemorating the 80th anniversary of the Battle of Britain and the Blitz.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and experts from BBC1's popular Antiques Roadshow turn sleuth as they explore intriguing stories behind family heirlooms. Hilary Kay investigates a rare artifact that's said to have adorned Oliver Cromwell's funeral procession.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates a sampler and the heart-wrenching tale of the incarceration of its creator in a Victorian workhouse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: John Foster and the team investigate two remarkable trophies that record great British moments of athletic endeavour.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates the mystery that surrounds a portrait of Tina Strobos, a member of the Dutch resistance during the 2nd World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Andy McConnell helps a daughter to discover the truth about her father's working life at the Whitefriars Glass factory.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Judith Miller pieces together the poignant story of a housemaid who was forced to give up her baby for adoption.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Hilary Kay investigates a rare medal and reveals the details of an extraordinary act of bravery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce investigates the story of a holocaust survivor and visits the Nazi concentration camp, Bergen Belsen. 70 years after the liberation of the camp by the British Army, Fiona organises an emotional meeting.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Marc Allum investigates the story of the Carpathia, the ship that went to the rescue of the Titanic survivors, and brings together two of the Captain's relatives.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Geoffrey Munn investigates the history of a ring that comes from perhaps the most explosive time in British history; the trial of Charles I.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates the role of the Medway Queen in the Dunkirk evacuation and takes a Grandson to visit his Grandfather's ship for the first time.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: The nature of the Nile as seen through the eyes of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: The Ethiopian highlands are the source of the unpredictable floods along the Nile.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: Following the footsteps of explorers Livingstone, Stanley, Burton and Speke, through jungles and swamps into the heart of Africa.

programme.desc: Allie discovers a rare Hawaiian coin from a ship that sank after the Pearl Harbor attack. Sean lets the team dive for sunken treasure provided it doubles as a training exercise. The deep-sea dive leads to discord, dissent, and explosive danger.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii

programme.desc: Dawn and Sean are drawn to the strange and spiritual powers of the mind. Kekoa, Allie and Jessie try to save lives after disaster strikes at a party.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Kekoa, Dawn and Allie reexamine their femininity. Jason rehearses a love scene with a sexy actress. JD tries to rebound from his breakup with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Dawn saves a skydiver who could be her ex-boyfriend in disguise. Jason is assigned to a Beach where he has to confront a terrible incident from his past.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jason falls for a Kahuna's beautiful granddaughter. Jenna wants to take over the team and shut down the training center she thinks is a waste of money. Sean vows to fight her.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean reveals a secret to Jenna that could threaten his job. Allie and Jason fly her helicopter to the big island where they have to rescue four people trapped on a volcanic lava reef.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jessie tries to overcome her condition to compete in the Maui triathlon with Dawn as her coach. Allie suspects an agenda behind Dawn's motives. Jason and Kekoa seek a mysterious underwater Hawaiian spirit that lures people to their deaths.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean tries to keep his relationship with Jenna a secret. When the team has to rescue swimmers trapped in a filtration tube, Jenna is sucked down a shaft and Sean risks everything to save her, revealing his darkest secret.

programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Joes to kick off the Welterweight Grand Prix as Rory MacDonald defeats his Welterweight belt against the veteran Jon Fitch. In the co-main event, Flyweight Champ Ilima Lei Macfarlane faces off against Veta Arteaga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event, Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt against MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Los Angeles with an epic night of fights as the Featherweight Grand Prix continues with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event a rematch between Lyoto Machida and former Middleweight Champion Gegard Mousasi.

programme.title: Bellator 229: Koreshkov vs Larkin
programme.desc: Russian “Spartan” Andrey Koreshkov returns in an anticipated welterweight match-up with hard-hitting Lorenz “The Monsoon” Larkin. Also, submission ace Goiti Yamauchi, Keri Taylor Melendez, and former kickboxing world champ Joe Schilling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy & Mark say they haven't spoken to their son, Cory, in a year as his wife, Katrina, is literally-- a witch! Katrina, a self-proclaimed "witch," says her inlaw's judge. Cory denies his wife controls him & he's against the poor treatment of his wife.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his exclusive interview with Michelle Knight, the first of three Cleveland kidnapping victims. Michelle, Ariel Castro’s self-professed “most hated” victim, emotionally recounts more horrific details including her dramatic rescue. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Thomas Cogdell was 12 when he and his mom discovered his 11-year-old sister, Kaylee, dead, tied up on her bed. Now 18, Thomas shares what he experienced on that fateful day. Don't miss this compelling look at false confessions & justice gone wrong.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget is worried her brother-in-law Kevin, 38, is having an inappropriate relationship with her daughter, Grace,16. Red flags went up when Grace told her that Kevin put whipped cream on his neck & asked her to lick it off. Kevin denies it all. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a parent's worst nightmare to learn their child was sexually abused, especially in their own home. Patty says her world ended the day she learned her husband was sexually abusing her 3 daughters. What warning signs did she miss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with David and his family.They claim Danielle is a violent, angry "devil" who becomes possessed. But are David and the family to blame for Danielle's behavior? Is there something deeper going on with Danielle? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says daughter, Danielle, 21, is out of control. She's been arrested twice, once for "clocking" a man she was dating in the face, & the second for public intoxication. She has violent rages, refuses to take her meds, does drugs, & drives drunk.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kaye, 70, says she has sent over $200,000 to "Aaron," a man she met on the Internet & has been "dating" for over a year, but never met in person. Tensions flare when the women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. And who is "Aaron?" Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Monster-In-Law is back! Khalood confessed to calling her son-in-law, Steve, a "loser" and "dumbass" and lacing his drink with a laxative! Does she still say Steve is incapable of supporting a family? Hear what Steve’s mom has to say about the feud!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Things heat up as Tiffany's brother accuses mom Wanda of stealing his wife's wedding rings! Plus, find out what Tiffany says to cause her dad to jump out of his seat in the audience & make his way to stage. Can Dr. Phil help this family communicate? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pageant mom Lori & daugther Alaska, 9, made news bleaching the girl's teeth & dyeing her eyelashes. Alaska's pic posted on TheDirty.com, with a man's claim he performed a sexual act while looking at the photo. Plus, Brittany, 21, had sex with a 14-yr-old.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tiki Barber joins Drew & Ross Mathews on Drew's News covering headlines about lies in relationships & finding a sheep in an Airbnb. Chef Anne Burrell teaches cooking honey garlic salmon & charred string beans in Drew's Cooking School.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, Drew helps the bridesmaid who went viral for accidentally eating a special cake for the bride and groom make her wedding wrong right.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Constance Wu gets candid with Drew about her radical honesty in her new collection of personal essays "Making A Scene," discussing everything from her mental health battle, sexual harassment and so much more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto? And, will it be used to save either Michie or Jack from eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother house, and become the first juror?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Three Houseguests will compete in America's Field Trip. Who will become the third nominee for eviction? Who will be punished and who will be safe for the week?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the power of veto? And will it be used to save either Christie, Cliff or Cat from eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother house, Cliff or Kat?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: See who wins the Head of Household Competition and the Power of Veto is back up for grabs.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto, and will it be used to save either Analyse or Christie from eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother house and sent to jury? Sis, or Christie?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who did you vote to take away half of Holly's power as Head of Household? And who will that Prankster Houseguest nominate for eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto, and will it be used to save either Nick or Christie from eviction? And Zingbot returns to roast the Final 8.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother House? Nick or Christie?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Next, who will become the new Head of Household?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power Of Veto? And will it be used to save either Jessica or Christie from the block?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother House, Jessica or Cliff? And who will follow them out the door because it's double eviction night?

programme.desc: Alan Johnson puts the pressure on Mark and Jez both, asking Mark to handle a big presentation at JLB, and propositioning Jez to lend him Big Suze for a price.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark joins a gym to get time away from Sophie and lets slip to his trainer that he's not in love with his bride-to-be. While there, he discovers Nancy, Jez's American visa wife, working there.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jez becomes a particularly "handy" handyman for his musical idol The Orgazoid. Mark goes to a school reunion and reignites an old crush, despite her being married to Mark's childhood tormentor and his being engaged.

programme.title: Trollied
programme.desc: It's Valco's 50th birthday and Gavin has organized a party celebrating 50 years of Valco Value. A treasure hunt is announced by Katie, however, Gavin and Cheryl are still not on speaking terms following the email opening scandal.

programme.title: Trollied
programme.desc: The search for the new Valco Area Manager is finally over, but news of the successful candidate leaves Gavin reeling. After an unexpected incident in store, Gavin's thoughts also turn to the amount of cheap unhealthy food that Valco pushes.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Bernard and Manny accept a house-sitting job to get away from their new cleaner. They also drink some wine. Meanwhile, Fran goes on an ill-fated date.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: A caffeine-fueled Manny is mistaken for a policeman. Bernard recalls a disastrous dinner party with old friends and Fran tells him about blanking her boyfriend after catching him with another woman.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys attempt to infiltrate a local firm of chariot hooligans in order to get some big drinkers into the bar.

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes tracks down a murderer who uses a young girl to lure victims to empty houses, where they are killed.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un terrorista suicida intente asesinar al ministro de Defensa de Belgravia, el equipo debe proteger a su hija, que está estudiando en Estados Unidos; Gibbs investiga la muerte de un marine que falleció en el atentado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando JJ y Jefe de Sección de Cruz son secuestrados, el UAC se adentra en la época de JJ en el Departamento de Estado para encontrar pistas sobre su desaparición y descubrir una misión secreta que ahora pone sus vidas en peligro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.desc: A pair of alliance-mates find themselves in a serious danger coming off of a surprise betrayal and look to improve their standing in the game.

programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.desc: Una figura del pasado despierta un recuerdo profundo y oscuro, como una historia familiar escrita a sangre fría.

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Tras una noche de pasión desenfrenada, Rebecca Carlson (Madonna) será juzgada por asesinato. Ahora está en manos de su abogado (Willem Dafoe) demostrar su inocencia, aunque el camino hacia la verdad tiene tantas curvas como su seductora cliente.

programme.title: Buscando a Susan desesperadamente
programme.desc: La fascinación de una aburrida ama de casa de las afueras de Nueva Jersey por una estrafalaria mujer sobre la que ha leído en varias revistas, le lleva a ser confundida con dicha mujer.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer interpreta a Frankie, una camarera en una cafetería de Nueva York. Después de una serie de relaciones desafortunadas, lo último que Frankie busca es un hombre nuevo... hasta que él viene a buscarla.

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: Sin embargo... es adorable
programme.desc: John Travolta se une a Sean Penn y Robin Wright en una película divertida, moderna y sobrecargada de emociones. Donde una mujer cuya pasión por dos hombres, completamente opuestos da como resultado un triángulo amoroso escandaloso y explosivo.

programme.title: Dos vidas contigo
programme.desc: ¿Quién sabía que cuando pidiera el especial, recibiría el plato de su vida? David Duchovny y Minnie Driver encienden chispas en esta historia afectuosa sobre un viudo y una camarera que parecían estar destinados a conocerse y enamorarse.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer interpreta a Frankie, una camarera en una cafetería de Nueva York. Después de una serie de relaciones desafortunadas, lo último que Frankie busca es un hombre nuevo... hasta que él viene a buscarla.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: Los buscapleitos
programme.desc: Thomas y David llevan una vida simple en España, trabajando en su camión de comidas rápidas pero todo cambia completamente por culpa de una hermosa ladrona, Sylvia.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Chris Klein, LL Cool J y Rebecca Romijn-Stamos forman parte del mejor equipo del brutal deporte del Rollerball. Cuando descubren que el propietario de la liga (Jean Reno) hará lo que sea por la audiencia, se prepararán para acabar con el deporte.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Después de Lucía.
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposa, Roberto se muda a la Ciudad de México con su hija, Alejandra. Ella se vuelve objeto de acoso cuando surge un video en el cual Alejandra tiene relaciones con un compañero.

programme.title: Un Lugar Lejano
programme.desc: Julián, un famoso fotógrafo, ha llegado a los 40 años, cansado, abandonado a su propia tristeza y soledad. Le acaban de descubrir un cáncer que va minando sus fuerzas y quitándole toda esperanza. Sin embargo, Julián tiene una visión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Canela
programme.desc: La dueña del restaurante, Tere, ha caído en un estado de depresión tras la trágica muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria de un pueblo descubre que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guión inteligente de Kevin Williamson "Scream" y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez "From Dusk Till Dawn

programme.title: El beso del vampiro
programme.desc: Después de una noche de sexo apasionado donde le muerden en el cuello a un editor literario un poco desquiciado, se convence de que él es un vampiro y comienza a representar el papel.

programme.title: La Sombra De La Noche
programme.desc: Un estudiante de derecho intenta ganar dinero como vigilante nocturno en la morgue de la ciudad. Pero pronto el turno nocturno es de terror cuando un asesino serial siembra el caos y deja pistas que señalan a Martin como sospechoso.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria de un pueblo descubre que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guión inteligente de Kevin Williamson "Scream" y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez "From Dusk Till Dawn

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: Un elefante llamado Vera
programme.desc: Bill Murray y Janeane Garafalo protagonizan está loca comedia sobre un hombre al que la vida le cambia para siempre cuando hereda un elefante de circo.

programme.title: La familia Perez
programme.desc: En el 1980, un dueño de una hacienda cubana es finalmente liberado tras pasar 20 años en la cárcel. Anhelando con ver a su esposa e hija, a él le permiten entrar al barco migratorio que va para Florida.

programme.title: Instinto fatal
programme.desc: Una seductora mujer empuñando un picahielo se lanza, con amor y risa, a una divertida parodia de Carl Reiner, leyenda de la comedia y director de 'The Jerk'. Coprotagonizan Armand Assante, Sherilyn Fenn, Kate Nelligan y Sean Young.

programme.title: De fiesta en las alturas
programme.desc: Un elenco estelar, que incluye a Tom Arnold, Kevin Hart, Method Man y Snoop Dogg se apodera de los cielos en esta irreverente comedia sobre una aerolínea que ofrece sensuales sobrecargos, casino y el antro de moda a ¡10,000 metros de altura!

programme.title: Los top five
programme.desc: Escrita, dirigida y protagonizada por Chris Rock, Los top five cuenta la historia de un comediante neoyorquino convertido en estrella de cine, Andre Allen, cuyo inesperado encuentro con una reportera lo obliga a enfrentarse con su carrera de comediante

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Alumno encubierto
programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned-revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: The Fugitive Kind
programme.desc: In this Tennessee Williams masterpiece, Marlon Brando is superb as a paradoxical drifter drawn into the desperate lives of two passionate women, Maureen Stapleton and Joanne Woodward, in a small Mississippi town.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: Another Time, Another Place
programme.desc: Mark Trevor, a World War II newsman with the British Broadcasting Corporation who's torn between two women. One is Sara Scott, the American reporter working in England. The two embark on a romance – but it's an affair destined for tragedy.

programme.title: The Children's Hour: The Children's Hour (1962)
programme.desc: In this provocatively daring film, an attention-seeking schoolgirl vengefully spreads rumors that her teachers (Audrey Hepburn and Shirley MacLaine) are lesbians.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker

programme.desc: A Best Actor Oscar went to Burt Lancaster for his outstanding performance as a con-man-turned-preacher in this provocative indictment of religious corruption.

programme.desc: Guess who's coming to Maude's fund-raising party for a black militant? Even Maude doesn't know who is coming and who isn't. When the guest of honor is late, Maude panics and insists Florida change clothes and act the role.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is given a speeding ticket by an eager young traffic cop who insists she was doing 34 miles per hour in a 30 miles per hour zone. Arthur offers to have the ticket 'fixed,' but Maude will not hear of it and insists on a full court trial.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is watching the national election results on television with Maude and Walter and reminds them of their stormy courtship days.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunkers are celebrating Edith's birthday in the city when Archie discovers that Edith failed to mail out a payment to the insurance company. This leads him to run across the street to drop it off. On his way, he gets stuck in an elevator.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A man shows up at the Bunker's door claiming to be a government agent and begins asking questions about a neighbor of the Bunkers. Archie soon becomes paranoid when he receives a phone call from a neighbor saying that Archie too is being investigated.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.desc: In the course of investigating the death of a film editor, Barnaby and J.R. uncover a movie pirating operation that could potentially cost the studio millions in lost revenue.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty investigates an academy for girls where a series of accidents have injured instructors and students alike. What she finds is a vicious group of girls who dominate the school through fear and intimidation tactics.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. investigates the disappearance of three women in a five week time period, and then gets involved with a psychic to help him when it looks like she might be his best chance of solving the case.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty goes undercover at a rehabilitation center for substance abuse addicts to investigate a suspicious death and discovers a sinister scheme where they administer dangerous drugs that keep patients coming back.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict. We follow an elephant flying squad which is responsible for keeping the elephants away from these human dominated landscapes.

programme.title: Wild Australia: The Edge
programme.desc: Rappel into a world of exotic creatures, beautiful and treacherous waterfalls, canyons, and underground rivers carved by streams as our modern bushwackers explore a natural wonderland as it was ninety million years ago.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Guided by Sean, Kristina explores the Matusadona National Park where they have incredible on- foot encounters with elephants and lions. Will she keep her cool as she comes face-to-face with one of Africa's apex predators?

programme.title: Beach Jackals
programme.desc: Through the eyes of researchers Ingrid Viesel and Eric Murray, the film explores all aspects of jackals' lives: their dens behind the dunes, their litter, their division of labor, their social interaction and communications.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Palm oil is used in so many modern conveniences and that leads Te Radar to Borneo to see how that impacts Orangutans as their habitat is cut down to make way for the plantations that ensure we can have our favourite instant noodles, crackers, chocolate…

programme.title: End Of The Big Cats
programme.desc: Cheetahs have already survived one extinction, estimated to have been around 10,000 years ago. Now, seen as a pest by farmers, and hunted vigorously, the cheetah is perilously close to a second exit.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire
programme.desc: Explore the great volcanoes that ring the Pacific Ocean and the cultures that coexist with them, including spectacular footage from Mt. St. Helens, Navidad in Chile, Sakurajima in Japan, and Mt. Merapi, Indonesia.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa vive con angustia, a la espera de la llamada de los secuestradores para exigir sus condiciones. A pesar de seguir las coordenadas, la policía no se espera los planes de Estanislao. Pero aparece alguien con la clave para el rescate.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: No solo la policía llega al escondite de Sara Montiel, donde comienza un enfrentamiento feroz, y el rescate de Lalo se convierte en un duelo a muerte entre Calixta y el Polaco. El plan de Cristóbal no será suficiente para liberar al hijo de Marisa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara, desesperada por acabar con su enemiga, tendrá el destino que jamás imaginó. El camino queda libre para llevar adelante los proyectos prometidos en la campaña del senador Parker y, en especial, el que unirá para siempre a Marisa y a Cristóbal.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Luján es una joven madre, valiente y emprendedora. Víctor la enamora y la deja sola con su hijo Lalo. Con mucho esfuerzo sale adelante como administradora de un pequeño hotel en Michoacán, hasta que regresa Miguelito, el narco del pueblo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La violencia se adueña de Michoacán y Marisa se ve obligada a huir con su hijo. Lalo quiere que se case con Víctor para tener estatus legal en EE. UU., pero Marisa sabe que el amor no se compra. En Nueva York, Cristóbal intenta desenmascarar a Ronnie.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no quiere compromisos y así se lo hace saber a la mujer con la que comparte, le dice a su madre que ha tomado una decisión. Justino le pregunta a Alicia cómo era su vida con Amador.

programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: ¡En este episodio, Christian Bravo visita un restaurante en el distrito de Lince!

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: En este episodio, nuestro chef Christian Bravo fue a conocer el restaurante D 'NINA y a su carismático dueño.

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: Únete a nuestro chef Christian Bravo para descubrir el restaurante de Jose Luis y Maria Abanto. Un restaurante que demuestra que cuando la creatividad y una buena temporada se unen, se consiguen grandes platos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.desc: Jon gets to meet Vivacia, the TV horror show hostess of his dreams. Wade Duck is caught in a 60-minute style interview.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield, Jon, and Odie head out into the great outdoors.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Residual Haunts
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Prospect, Maine to investigate Fort Knox, built before the Civil War to protect the Penobscot narrows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Home by Spring

programme.title: I Do, I Do, I Do

programme.title: Once Upon a Winter's Date
programme.desc: Katherine, a workaholic executive, endures the worst Valentine's Day date of her life. On her walk home, a gypsy weaves a magical spell on her and when she wakes up the next morning, she realizes it's Valentine's Day again.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.title: Cambio de marca

programme.title: Cocina con Amor
