programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A bully that works with Lenny and Squiggy is always pushing them around. He gets them to set him up with Laverne, but he has only one thing on his mind. Will the guys step aside or stand up to him and save Laverne?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: As Shirley goes back for a grocery item, Laverne's at the checkout line, winning a shopping spree. Shirley feels jealous of her, but soon Laverne sees she's forgotten her friend. The two then team up for an all-out 5 minute, Supermarket Sweep.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley and her brother think she's adopted as she doesn't resemble any Feeneys. Later at the hospital where Shirley was born the girls try to get the truth by accessing a private file room in disguise. Is Shirley not a true Feeney female?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne shows Lenny a kindness and then gives him a kiss. Lenny now feels he loves her, and she's now his. No one can get through to him that this isn't the case, but Laverne hopes to let him down easy without completely breaking his heart.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A small fire in the girls' bedroom becomes the start of a rift between them. Both girls become smitten with one of the handsome firemen that show up. Who will warm his heart and whose hopes will be extinguished?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: All are baffled by a woman's interest in Squiggy as a boyfriend. He loves her like crazy. She's able to make her every whim his command. Can Squiggy be woken up to see she's only using him?

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is the beautiful bride and Mork is the outrageously funny groom - who may not be able to fit into his tuxedo if he can't convince Orson to approve the marriage and undo his transformation of Mork into an English sheep dog.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork buys Mearth a fortune in presents to assure his happiness, and when Mindy, fearing a spoiled child, orders that they be returned, their unusual child decides they don't love him anymore.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: To prove to his college journalism professor that he has what it takes to be a good investigative reporter, Richie gets down and dirty to expose who's behind an illegal garbage collection scheme.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy discovers a horse is being abused at Mallen's farm and convinces her mother to rescue him. On the way home, a raging storm sends their truck careening off the road.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou mistakenly sends Mrs. Roach’s horse, Swallow, home before his fear of traffic is cured. An unknowing Ashley is violently thrown off when the horse is spooked by a truck.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: In order to drum up business for Heartland, Lou is organizing an open house. Amy is totally against it. After all, she’s managed to drum up some high-profile clients on her own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa Stillman sends her nephew Ben to live at Heartland. While Amy and Lou are cleaning out Marion’s old room in preparation for Ben’s arrival, they come across an old letter written by their dad.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou decides to make a promotional video to advertise Heartland, nobody is very supportive of the idea. But Lou is determined, perhaps even more than usual.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou's boyfriend, Carl, comes for a visit and his big-city plans clash with the ranch's more laid-back lifestyle. Amy is puzzled by why a new horse at Heartland won't obey commands.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou isn’t pleased when a neighboring rancher brings a pregnant mare to stay at Heartland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The pressure is on when a famous racehorse, Gallant Prince, is sent to Heartland to see if it can be rehabilitated after being terribly burned and injured in a highly published stable fire.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A girl from Ty's troubled past gets a job at Briar Ridge and comes to Heartland looking for him. When Mrs. Bell goes to the hospital after a heart attack, Lou becomes attached to her pony, Sugarfoot.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty has a run-in with a cruel cowboy when the local ranchers round up some local mustangs for the veterinarian to test.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Jack relents and allows Tim to visit Heartland, the simmering sibling rivalry between Amy and Lou heats to a boil.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the barn at Heartland erupts into flames and Jack is injured getting the horses to safety. Heartland may never be the same again after Lou discovers the barn isn’t insured.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: With the Fall Finale only a few days away, Amy finds herself working with the enemy after Ben convinces Ashley that Heartland is the only place that can help her suddenly uncooperative horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy is fascinated with a white mustang that has been spotted around Heartland. Lou is working on plans for an Equine Executive Retreat, but Grandpa Jack is none too thrilled with the idea.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison pumps up the creativity and changes up the layout of a galley kitchen space; she shortens a large window and moves the sink underneath to maximize countertop and cabinet space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A dark and outdated kitchen is gutted and opened up into a Mid Century Modern space in just three days with brand new hardwood floors, all new cabinets, bright backsplash, banquette seating and a custom walnut dining table.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: The crew finds a couple of California homeowners with an enormous kitchen that only has its size going for it; its problems include exposed plywood and dated cabinets.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A cramped kitchen is revamped by partially knocking down the wall into the dining room and accenting the room with an arch and distressed corbels.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Beachy wall tiles, a mix of butcher block and stone countertops, a swinging chair and a faux green wall finish off a rebuilt kitchen.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A bland and boring backyard is completely transformed into the ultimate outdoor kitchen; a live edge dining table becomes the focal point.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An urban backyard is overhauled with composite gray decking cut in a unique pattern, a built-in bench with planters and stone bases, and Garapa wood mounted horizontally to a wall to enclose the space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Custom pizza oven built into a fireplace; new floors, cabinets, countertops, paint and lighting; custom welded bar table, dining table and stained wood bar wall.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A grimy outdated kitchen with pink tile, tired cabinets and worn appliances is blown up into an elegant farmhouse kitchen in three short days.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison has a big project on her hands as she flips an ancient kitchen into a modern masterpiece by re-vamping the floor plan, eliminating a window, opening up the doorway to a small nook and doubling the size of the main entrance.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew find a couple of homeowners with a huge kitchen that has become almost unusable; a new layout, flooring, cabinets, countertops and appliances.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An outdoor kitchen that screams lets have a party, complete with its own kegorator.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Alison and the crew install an outdoor kitchen, beginning with the addition of new pavers, outdoor cabinetry, a shade structure, an outdoor television, a swinging day bed, a wine bar and beer tap, and desert-friendly plants.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A large, dimly lit kitchen feels like a cave; Alison transforms the kitchen into a two-toned open kitchen that looks spacious.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An old kitchen is updated with a retro atomic vibe using high gloss white cabinets, a vintage diamond backsplash in green and gold, a retro kidney-shaped table, and shelving from chrome pipes.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A worn-out kitchen from the 60's is updated into a mid-century modern space using a custom banquette area, nesting suitcase tables, and a unique gold record stool.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew tackle an outdoor kitchen with marine grade cabinets, stone countertops, outdoor appliances and freshly painted furniture.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison creates a modern-looking kitchen with stainless-steel and glass cabinets, gray countertops, a white kitchen island, a custom-built wine rack, and a bar cart made from industrial pipes.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison draws inspiration from nature with an earth-tone palette, a mosaic-stone backsplash, granite countertops, a waterfall island, and hardwood floors; Alison also builds a dog food bin from reclaimed hardwood and adds a tree design to a wall.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew renovate a large kitchen with hand-scraped flooring and dark wood cabinets; Alison and the homeowners team up to create custom elements such as a kitchen island, a banquet bench with a waterfall edge, and wine storage.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A kitchen that hasn't been touched since the 1960s gets transformed into a family-friendly space with turquoise cabinets, a white backsplash, retro appliances, and cork flooring.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison designs an Italian-style kitchen with rustic features, including a faux beam, espresso-colored cabinets, marbled countertops, textured flooring, and a one-of-a-kind pendant light.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison transforms Porsha's builder-grade kitchen into a stylish space with an old-world, Moroccan vibe; Alison brings down a wall to open up the kitchen, then designs a mosaic table and built-in banquette to fill an under-utilized space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew tackle a small kitchen, transforming it into a sleek, stylish space with accents more commonly seen in big-city lofts.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison renovates Fred and Dani's kitchen which has mismatched appliances, dated cabinets and fluorescent lights; she makes it mesh with the rest of their Spanish-style home, removes the cabinetry and opens it up to allow for an island with stools.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers

programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: Best of Michael Bolton Live
programme.desc: Bringing down the house in his first concert release, Michael Bolton is the Grammy-winning music giant with more than 40 million records sold and the recipient of five "Million Performance Song Awards".

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Glory Days
programme.desc: Bruce Frederick Joseph Springsteen, more fondly known as "The Boss" by his millions of fans, is widely regarded as one of the most influential songwriters of the 20th century and one of the greatest artists of all time. This is his remarkable story.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: On the Road
programme.desc: Coming from a poor background in New Jersey, Bruce Springsteen grew to become one of the most recognizable faces in rock music. Having released classic albums such as Born in the U.S.A and Born to Run, Bruce Springsteen's music is legendary.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Busy Being Born
programme.desc: Few musicians have made an impact throughout the decades as seismic as Bob Dylan. Retrace his journey, from humble folk beginnings in Hibbing, to the bustling electric Greenwich Village.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: The Man in Black
programme.desc: Johnny Cash is one of the most accomplished and influential artists of the 20th century.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: One Song at a Time
programme.desc: Retrace the remarkable story of America’s greatest country artist, one song at a time. Watch and experience the highs and lows of Johnny Cash’s career, the original man in black.

programme.title: Mick Jagger: A Knight to Remember

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Reichen's online scandal generates gossip about his relationship with Rodiney, and newcomer Nyasha makes a dramatic entrance by stumbling into the midst of an A-List crossfire in the explosive season premiere.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The drama continues as the A-Listers navigate the social world of New York City.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Fights break out as the A-Listers see how crazy life can be in New York City.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Things get heated yet again in New York City as the A-Listers find out their true colors.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The drama continues as the A-Listers navigate life in New York.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Austin's on the outs as Nyasha makes her move at securing friendships to support her company's new product line.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: At a fundraiser, Austin must prove to Jake that he is capable of having a platonic relationship with Reichen. Austin takes an opportunity to pull Derek aside to beg for his forgiveness, but will Derek hear him out?

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: Alliances shift and tables are turned as Austin continues to alienate those closest to him. He and Jake continue to plan their wedding even though their relationship has dissolved to nothing more than fake smiles.

programme.title: The A-List: New York
programme.desc: The drama continues as the group plans an Atlantic City weekend filled with booze, bachelors, and, of course, plenty of bad behavior. Despite rumors of cheating, Austin and Jake are still ready to take a trip down the aisle.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens enter the world of musical theater. With guest judges composer Lucian Piane, and Sheryl Lee Ralph (Dream Girls).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in a quick-witted TV game show. With guest judges Gillian Jacobs (Community) and Heather McDonald (Chelsea Lately).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to rap in a TLC-inspired 90s music video. Rap superstars Eve and Trina guest judge.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: In the run-up to her engagement party, Karlie's haters plot to expose a long-buried secret. Scrapp gets caught up with his ex. Joc debates coming clean to Kendra. Spice's new look causes an uproar on social media and in real life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie gets surprising news from her fertility doctor and Arkansas Mo. Moniece confronts Scrapp about his viral video scandal. Erica makes a shocking announcement. Tokyo and Shekinah check Che for her bad behavior. Akbar suffers a traumatic injury.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Secrets and lies come to light at Kirk and Rasheeda's couples retreat. Karlie tangles with a surprise visitor. Fresh bombshells rock Sierra and BK's relationship. Back in the A, Moniece's collab with Akbar goes left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tokyo and Akbar clash at their showcase. Karlie goes after Kendra and Bambi as she spirals out of control at the cabin. Erica tries to make peace with Scrappy. Pooh hosts a disastrous cocktail party.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice invites Karlie, Joc, and friends to Trinidad. Sierra tries to broker peace between Tokyo and Akbar. Pooh fights to clear her name. Scrapp helps put on a charity benefit. Shekinah handles business for Che.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: The crew arrives in Trinidad. Karlie checks Tokyo and Shekinah. Joc, Kirk, and Scrappy go on a jungle adventure. Pooh airs out Karlie's dirty laundry. Akbar and Scrapp help Che through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Conflict erupts between Joc and Kendra at an all-night rave in Trinidad. Karlie introduces the crew to her family, and Pooh drops scandalous new receipts. Back in The A, Stevie comes face to face with Scrapp for the first time since he went to prison

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice races from Africa to Trinidad for her performance at Machel Monday. Rasheeda blasts Kirk after a shocking discovery. Pooh makes one last attempt to squash the beef with Karlie. Akbar and Sierra's friendship goes all the way left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie and Mo's issues boil over at a dramatic therapy session. Shekinah uncovers a scandal at Joc's salon. Stevie leads Scrapp and the guys on an outdoor adventure. Rasheeda sets boundaries with Jasmine. Sierra has an angry run-in with BK.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Drama erupts at Kirk and Rasheeda's seminar. Ty questions Mimi's relationship with Stevie. The mothers of Joc's children weigh in on Kendra. Pooh and Akbar link up to take down Shekinah. Scrapp debates his next move with Sierra.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Kendra gets wind of the scandalous rumors about Joc. Insensitive comments spark an emotional argument between Spice and Shekinah. Tokyo goes missing. Scrapp struggles to break the cycle. Akbar finds common ground with an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie and her daughter collide with Pooh and her daughter at Rasheeda's event. Joc digs himself a deeper hole with Kendra. Scrappy struggles after a disastrous family get-together. Tokyo opens up to her mom about her personal struggles.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Mimi and Faith get caught up in Stevie and Ty's beef. Joc plots a happy ending with Kendra. Scrappy comes to terms with his car accident. Pooh and Sierra collide at Spice and Akbar's session. Karlie arrives at a crossroads on her fertility journey.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: On part 1 of the Reunion, the cast gets together with host Nina Parker to wrap up a season filled with drama. We get the real on relationships, co-parenting, and even throw a little "Pooh" on the fire.The night is buttoned up with a lie detector test

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/21: Rafael Devers launches a three-run home run in the 3rd inning, then Kiké Hernández lifts a walk-off sacrifice fly in the 9th inning to take down the Rays and send the Red Sox to the American League Championship Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/2021: The Braves win the 2021 NLDS in four games thanks to Freddie Freeman's first home run of the postseason, a go-ahead shot off Josh Hader in the bottom of the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/65: Sandy Koufax finishes a complete-game shutout in Game 7 of the 1965 World Series to bring home a championship. The Dodgers' 2-0 victory was capped in the top of the 4th inning when runs scored on a homer and an RBI single.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/79: In a pivotal Game 5, the Pirates score seven runs late in the game. Jim Rooker and Bert Blyleven throw a one-run game starting the Pirates' comeback in the 1979 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/84: Kirk Gibson clinched the Tigers' 1984 World Series win with a three-run homer off Goose Gossage. With the win, Sparky Anderson becomes the first manager ever to win a championship in both the American and National Leagues.

programme.title: MST3K: Teen-Age Strangler
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch the dreary educational short Is This Love? (1957) and the horrifyingly bad Teenage Strangler (1964).

programme.title: MST3K: Teenage Caveman
programme.desc: In Teenage Cave Man (1958), a rebellious cave boy goes against clan rules and wants to explore horizons beyond the river

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: MST3K: Operation Kid Brother (Operation Double 007)
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon (played by Neil Connery, brother of Sean), the brother of a secret agent, combats villain Thair Beta.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The Satellite of Love crew take on a short about grocery store freezers.

programme.title: MST3K: The Mask
programme.desc: For MST3K's first-ever Halloween episode, Jonah's crew watch THE MASK (1961) in 3D! Jonah teaches the bots about Halloween.

programme.title: MST3K: The Bubble
programme.desc: Joel's crew watch as a married couple find themselves trapped in a mysterious town in THE BUBBLE (1966). The test subjects hatch a plan to escape.

programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Sometimes, people kill or claim the blame for murder because they want to be famous. We delve into the psychological motivations of murder and infamy when a mild-mannered, grey-haired grandmother accuses her boyfriend of the murder.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: A probe into how the justice system uses psychics to solve tough cases. Looks at how widespread the practice is, and whether or not psychic evidence holds up in court.

programme.title: American Justice

programme.desc: Trina goes live with her unique dating website and it becomes a huge success until she shuts it down to stop a prostitution hub. When one of the users from the site turns up dead, Trina looks to her now-defunct site for clues to solve the crime.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets

programme.title: Deadly Influencer

programme.title: Berlin, I Love You
programme.desc: Ten stories of love, compassion, redemption and acceptance set against the vivid backdrop of Berlin.

programme.title: The Age of Adaline
programme.desc: A woman (Blake Lively) who has miraculously remained young for nearly 80 years meets a charismatic philanthropist (Michiel Huisman) who reawakens her passion for life and romance.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: Two high school overachievers decide to cram four years of not-to-be missed fun into one night -- a chaotic adventure that no amount of book smarts could prepare them for.

programme.title: Lady of the Manor
programme.desc: Slacker Hannah gets hired to portray Lady Wadsworth -- a Southern belle from the 1800s -- for tours at Wadsworth Manor. Hannah figures she can fake it well, until the ghost of Lady Wadsworth appears and tells her it's time to change her wild ways.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale Vs. Evil
programme.desc: Two best friends are mistaken for murderous hillbillies by a group of college kids.

programme.title: Blade of the Immortal
programme.desc: Manji, a highly skilled samurai, becomes cursed with immortality after a legendary battle. Haunted by the brutal murder of his sister, Manji knows that only fighting evil will regain his soul. The 100th film by master director TAKASHI MIIKE.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: Urusei Yatsura: Beautiful Dreamer

programme.title: Mac and Me
programme.desc: A young boy confined to a wheelchair finds a lost alien creature and helps him return to his home and learn many magical things in the process.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: A Ming Dynasty freedom fighter (Jet Li), a female warrior (Zhou Xun) and a corrupt eunuch (Kun Chen) are among those who converge on a remote desert hostel that sits atop a city of treasures.

programme.title: Wicked City

programme.title: Timbiriche La Misma Piedra
programme.desc: Una divertida mirada al último reencuentro del grupo Timbiriche, a 25 años de su creación. Cómo viven entre los ensayos, la gira, los problemas y los hijos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Aquí la naturaleza ha creado algunos de los paisajes más fabulosos del mundo. En el oeste americano, lo que es realidad y lo que es ilusión a menudo convergen, y ciertas ilusiones son, de hecho, muy reales.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Qatar es diminuto en superficie, pero enorme en ambición. Filmado desde todos los ángulos, y en medio de un auge de la construcción, sea testigo del futuro emerger del desierto.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Aprende las astutas tácticas que los animales utilizan para establecer jerarquías, asegurar recursos, ganar territorio y seducir a sus parejas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Conocido durante siglos como el “Corazón oscuro de África”, el Congo es un mundo tridimensional de varias capas en ebullición con incontables especies.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Mientras la mayoría considera a los grandes gatos o los grandes colmillos como los verdaderos íconos salvajes de África, pocos aprecian a las criaturas más pequeñas que dominan la pradera - los antílopes.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on the today's explosive MAURY.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kayla and Bruce took a home DNA test that said Bruce was not the father of her baby, but she refuses to believe that test, so they'll settle it today! Chaundra and Holly suspect Christian the father of their 4 kids! Did Rikki cheat on his wife twice?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mike's wife of 20 years, Beverly, left him 5 months ago and has been living with an "old flame!" Then Christine has been sleeping with her husband's friend! She says he drove her to it since he treats her badly.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer caught her boyfriend and friend of 7 years in their hotel room and now she wants answers! Then, After 6 years, Ralph is finally ready to call it quits with his girlfriend. But she will give him a run for his money before she lets him go!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chrishon denies he’s engaged to Taiwana with 3 weeks until their wedding. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her for another woman while pregnant! Dave still wants Leesa’s love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katie feels that the only way she can save her relationship with Lorenzo is by getting a DNA test to prove he's the father! Then, Tabatha and Derrick took a break. Amanda claims he fathered her newborn son, but Derrick says she is a liar and a stalker!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her 10 month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna has been waiting to return for a DNA and lie detector test to prove that Anthony's the father and she has been faithful to him! Then, Patrick returns to prove that he's not the father of Angel's baby while her man Dale fumes!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Brianna and Sam are ready to be parents, but her mother and stepfather are here to convince them that 18 is too young for parenthood. Later, Heather, Britney, and Taylor are all pregnant and claim that James is the father!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nikki revela sus aventuras fraternales secretas, pero ¿podrá Joe perdonarla? Después, "Six O'Clock" confiesa que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su amiga Carisa por dinero.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Johnny quiere que su novia Aimee lo acepte como es. Después, Maya viene al programa para confrontar a su novio Eric sobre sus costumbres.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario llega a la oficina de Patricio y lo agarra por la pechera, para reclamarle por haber obligado a Rosaura a casarse con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Doña Cruz está consolando a su nieta, Rosaura, y al abrazarla cae desploma sobre la cama. Patricio habla con su abogado, con la intención de quitarle todo a Doña Cruz.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Morgana quiere matar a Willy para que su hija pueda recibir la herencia, pero Margot la detiene, pidiéndole que mate a Mariana en su lugar. Morgana explica que si hacen eso, ella será la primera sospechosa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy encuentra a Mariana en brazos de Martin y le provoca una crisis de celos. Martin lo pone en su lugar y Santiago le recuerda a Willy que no puede seguir interfiriendo y que está casado con Margot.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bon is overjoyed to hear that Luffy is still alive, but his happiness quickly turns to shock when he learns that Ivan's agonizingly painful "Healing Hormones" will cost the rubber-man ten years of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is scheduled to be executed in a matter of hours, and Luffy's still hovering on the verge of death. It will take a miracle to save them both, but Bon would rather die than give up on his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy miraculously survived his brush with death, but he's far too weak to finish rescuing Ace. Ivan is reluctant to lend a hormonal hand to the doomed rescue mission – until he learns of Luffy's lineage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The quest to rescue Ace tuckers out thanks to a blast of sleeping gas! Ivan's scissor-handed sidekick puts an end to nap time, but Luffy will have to join forces with a scar-faced foe from the past if he wants to complete his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's desperate attempt to rescue Ace is bolstered by two powerful new allies: the murderous Crocodile and the honorable fishman Jinbei. Meanwhile, Ivan sparks a prison riot to create a diversion for the rubber-man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang of outlaws cause a commotion on Level Four, Blackbeard's arrival leads to the release of the prison's most feared inmate, and Ace gazes upon the great blue sky for what could be the very last time!

programme.desc: Ivan undergoes a curvaceous transformation to better battle sadistic Sadie, the commander of the Demon Guards. Meanwhile, Blackbeard and Shiryu head for a showdown on Level 1!

programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of Leah Robinson, the team begins to suspect that she may not be as innocent as her husband and minister think she is.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Rachel, an agoraphobic advice columnist who hadn't left her apartment in 2 years. While casing her apartment for clues, they ponder the relevance of a walkie-talkie.

programme.desc: Jorge Vallejo is among Mexico City's rare chefs. His food has inspired Rick and Deanne for many years, but what inspires Jorge? One word: Tacos. Rick follows Jorge on a taco tour, from Tacos Gus to Taqueria Los Cocuyos, it is taco time.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern joins Ming in his loft kitchen. Andrew cooks up a Shrimp Etouffee, and Ming follows that up with one of his favorites he makes at home: a Classic Salt and Pepper Head-on Shrimp served over rice.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Jacques Pepin starts off by making an Arctic Char with Tomato and Mini Savory Cheesecakes. Ming does his own version of Arctic Char, poaching it in olive oil and serving it up on one of his favorites: sushi rice cakes.

programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and his co-host break down thermonuclear fusion; they discuss a movie mistake.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After helping relocate the Taranans, the Atlantis team realizes they haven't heard from the village in a long period of time. It appears the Taranans have just abandoned their village until McKay detects life signs well beneath the surface.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is shocked when a satellite housing a stargate takes up orbit above Atlantis. When the stargate begins transmitting an energy beam, attacking the city, McKay takes a page from the Ancients and opts to sink Atlantis back into the ocean.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Atlantis starts shutting down due to a damaged power system, Rodney McKay turns off all non-essential systems. But in just 28 hours, McKay realizes the city’s shields may fail completely and its inhabitants will succumb the vacuum of space.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Sheppard leads a daring raid to secure a ZPM that will save Atlantis. When the Replicators become aware of the incursion into their city, Sheppard’s team must keep them at bay or else abandon the mission and their hope of saving Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Ronon reconnects with a group of Satedans from his past who enlist the Atlantis team's help on a dangerous mission against the Wraith. But after the Atlantis crew is captured, Ronon is faced with the truth about his old friends’ new loyalties.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the Destiny still out of power, a plan is born to abandon the ship using the last working shuttle, in hopes that another planet will be habitable. But hope is short-lived when the only way to determine who will go and who will stay is a lottery.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Despite severe rationing and around-the-clock security, the water reserves onboard the Destiny continue to drop. Dr. Nicholas Rush has no explanation for this latest setback but, if they are to survive, they must find a new water source soon.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A strange crystal strikes down O'Neill, replacing him with a double that returns with the team to Earth to find the cause of O'Neill's private grief...his son's death. But the double is dangerously unstable. Can O'Neill return home to save everyone?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a planned ambush goes disastrously wrong, resulting in fatalities among the SG-1 team, the peace-loving Nox restore them to life. But while these gentle people can bring back the dead, can they resist the deadly technology of the Goa'uld?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the mysterious planet Argos, the beautiful Kynthia seduces Colonel Jack O'Neill, which means he's condemned to an Argosian lifespan of only a hundred days. As he turns gray, will his team succeed in their frantic search for a cure?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Looking for allies against the Goa'uld, the SG-1 team lands on Cimmeria, home of the legendary Norse gods. Teal'c and O'Neill are transported to an underground labyrinth of caves of the vicious creature Unas. Can Carter & Daniel rescue them?

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa is reluctant to have a house guest, but Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor. Jung accuses Janet of being coldhearted and Shannon tackles workplace bullying .

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts spending all his time with Beezy, Heloise decides to teach the boys a lesson. --- When an obsessed bus driver adopts Jimmy as his new best friend, it’s all buses, all the time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Miseryville goes into hibernation, Jimmy is the only one left awake. --- After Lucius loses his voice barking orders for his birthday party, Jimmy steps in to interpret the instructions.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy and Beezy take to nature when they decide there are too many rules in Miseryville, man. --- When Cerbee runs off with Jimmy's home, Heloise and Beezy fight over who gets Jimmy as a houseguest.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lucius commissions a high-powered jet to help spread doom and gloom across Miseryville, but the misery’s on him when Jimmy winds up behind the controls.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy suspects that his new neighbor is really the thing he fears most… a giant pickle. --- Jimmy and Beezy vie to join the Rodeo Clown's 'Cool Clown Club'.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy turns the tables on Lucius Fools Day, the one day a year when Lucy gets to inflict more misery than usual. --- After accidentally lopping off Lucius’ horns, Jimmy must turn to one of Heloise's concoctions to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When the Heinous Museum is under attack, Heloise and Jimmy are pressed into security service. --- Lucius and the Weavils sign a peace treaty forcing Beezy to marry the unsightly Princess Weavil.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After Beezy crushes the commander of the Gnomans, the tiny army of laborers makes him their new leader. --- When Heloise catches a mean case of the hiccups, the boys must (for once) take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Sonic Boom

programme.title: Sonic Boom

programme.title: Sonic Boom

programme.title: Sonic Boom
